test case id: tc-registration-001 title: verify user registration process module: registration source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: - username: testuser - password: test1234 - email: testuser@example.com test steps: 1. start the application 2. click on "utente registrato?" decision node 3. enter username, password, and email in the registration form 4. click "submit" button 5. wait for confirmation message expected result: user should be redirected to the homepage with a success message indicating registration was successful.

test case id: tc-registration-002 title: verify user registration with invalid credentials module: registration source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: - username: testuser - password: short - email: testuser@example.com test steps: 1. start the application 2. click on "utente registrato?" decision node 3. enter username, password, and email in the registration form 4. click "submit" button 5. wait for error message expected result: user should not be redirected to the homepage. an error message should indicate that the password is too short.

test case id: tc-profile-002 title: verify updating user profile with incorrect data module: profile source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in test data: - field 1: updatedvalue1 - field 2: - field 3: updatedvalue3 - field 4: updatedvalue4 test steps: 1. click on "profile" in the menu 2. fill in the profile fields with updated data, leaving the second field empty 3. click "save" button 4. wait for error message expected result: the profile should not be updated. an error message should indicate that the second field is required. the user should remain on the profile page to correct the data.

test case id: tc-profile-003 title: verify updating user profile with empty fields module: profile source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in test data: - field 1: - field 2: - field 3: - field 4: test steps: 1. click on "profile" in the menu 2. leave all fields empty 3. click "save" button 4. wait for error message expected result: the profile should not be updated. an error message should indicate that all fields are required. the user should remain on the profile page to correct the data.

test case id: tc-viewalerts-001 title: verify viewing all alerts module: viewalerts source pages: 4 preconditions: user is logged in and has alerts test data: test steps: 1. click on "view alerts" in the menu 2. wait for the list of alerts to load 3. click on a specific alert 4. wait for the alert details to load expected result: the list of alerts should load, and clicking on a specific alert should display its detailed information.
